notes: A metaphysical masterpiece by Nolan who's cementing is role of deep, soulful  and visually striking movies creator. Real Cinema, serious topic, strong acting performance and sublim direction. Matthew, Jessica and Anne are great, that's why the movies work great. A MUST SEEN, get to work and rewatch if you are already initiated !
title: Interstellar

notes: Peak existential sci-fi. Matrix was so impactful that we can fairly say that there was a world before Matrix and a brand new one right after the release. From Theatre to 4K Blu-Ray, this movie is the apogée of everything we expect + executed in a visual style that has never been seen before. Wether you fall in love with Trinity or want more pills from Morpheus, Matrix will take you to the next level of consciousness. Be ready for the escape, the elevation, the initiation.
title: The Matrix

notes: Nolan Mind Bugging Thoughts architecture at its finest. Intricated realities, quantum feeling, cognitive space exploration, let's goooooooo. Different type of entertainment and it works just great. Strong Cast, Strong Direction, just sit back, relax and enjoy.  Absynth drinkers, it's time to deploy the elixir.
title: Inception

notes: Friendship, Strategy, Hierarchy, IQ segregation, escape, freedom. If not seen, just jump on it before I jump on you !!!
title: The Shawshank Redemption

notes: FOOLISH BABY !!! This is what Cinema is about. Quentin at his best, Travolta come-back and Uma Thurman Dark Haircut will get you were you need to be, because we both know you are NOT where you're supposed to be !!!
title: Pulp Fiction

notes: IMAX. Thanks Christopher, thanks again. DARK - DEEP - DOMINATING. Yes it's the TRIPLE D Fellas ! Not your average Hero Movies, actually this movie is a BIG FUCK YOU to all the bullshit super hero movies, fuck Marvel and fuck you too !
title: The Dark Knight
Star Wars: Episode I - The Phantom Menace

notes: Listen, you spiritually bankrupt peasant, if you’re watching this on a laptop you’re basically begging for a High-Intensity lobotomy, we are talking about Jan weaponizing a city bus into a Sovereign death-trap while you sit there like a comrade in a bread line waiting for a signal! Keanu is the Stoic Operator you’ll never be, navigating a Monolithic pressure cooker while your brain vibrates at the frequency of a Marvel-tier NPC! If you don't have the Absolute grit to handle this Triple D velocity on a physical 4K disc, then your Internal Citadel is made of wet cardboard and you deserve to go up in flames with the rest of the uninitiated!
